qa_pairs.question: How are the RAC allocation values calculated?
qa_pairs.answer: The values represent an average across all of our facilities and include the total capital and operational costs incurred by the Federation to deliver the resources and associated services. These are not commercial or market values.

qa_pairs.question: Even though I explained how a reduction in my requested allocation would impact my research, why was my final allocation less than my request?
qa_pairs.answer: Each year, our infrastructure is heavily oversubscribed. A scaling function is applied to compute requests to provide a means by which decisions on allocations in a context of insufficient capacity can be made.

qa_pairs.question: Why is a scaling function applied to compute requests for resource allocation?
qa_pairs.answer: A scaling function is applied to compute requests to provide a means by which decisions on allocations in a context of insufficient capacity can be made, due to the infrastructure being heavily oversubscribed each year.
